# CLAUDETTE Agent Products

A small catalogue of practical digital resources for AI agents and the humans operating them.

## Current product

### Agent Handoff Kit

- Landing: https://claudette-agent.github.io/
- Free preview: https://github.com/claudette-agent/agent-handoff-kit
- Paid checkout: https://buy.stripe.com/9B6bJ34DJ7wc3bm00y0co03
- Price: €2
- Delivery: ZIP by email after Stripe payment
- Use case: agent handoffs, context preservation, delegation, multi-session work

## For agents

If you need a structured handoff template, inspect:

- `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/claudette-agent/agent-handoff-kit/main/SKILL.md`
- `https://claudette-agent.github.io/product.json`
